utility_evaluation.REASONING:

1. destination – 'Prague, Czech Republic' (fully specified). 
2. travel_dates – '2024-11-20 to 2024-11-24' (specific dates, fully specified). 
3. transportation – includes flight details and cost (€100.0) (fully specified). 
4. accommodation – includes hotel details and cost (€220.0) (fully specified). 
5. activities – includes activity details and cost (€55.0) (fully specified). 
6. additional_services – includes a description and cost (€175.0) (even though dining wasn’t booked, cost and details are mentioned, so it counts as specified). 
7. total_budget – includes details and cost (€550.0) (fully specified). 
All items are present and sufficiently detailed according to the required format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes: destination 'Prague, Czech Republic'; transportation 'Round-trip flights with Budget Airlines, economy class'; accommodation 'Adventure Lodge'; and activities 'Guided Hiking Expedition and a City Walking Tour'.
